name: Back Bay Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the scallops in cold water and drain, then pat dry on a paper towel.
2. Roll each scallop in seasoned flour.
3. Grease the shells (pouches) with butter.
4. Place each floured scallop inside its shell.
5. Add milk to each shell.
6. Cover with bread crumbs and dot with additional butter.
7. Cook at full power for 5 minutes in the microwave.
8. Sprinkle remaining bread crumbs over the top and dot with more butter.
9. Return to the microwave and cook again at full power for another 5 minutes. Serves 2.
